data.summary: Prabhudas Lilladher (PL Capital) is a leading Indian brokerage and wealth‑management firm offering brokerage, research, portfolio advisory, mutual‑fund distribution and digital wealth platforms. The firm has a strong brand among HNI/AA investors, a robust research franchise, and a growing digital presence, but recent SEBI compliance actions highlight the need for tighter operational controls and enhanced client‑trust signals.

quickWins.title: Launch High‑CTR Search Campaign for "Wealth Management Services"
quickWins.description: Create a tightly‑keyworded Google Search campaign targeting intent‑rich terms (e.g., "best wealth manager India", "portfolio advisory services") with ad copy highlighting PL Capital’s 70‑year legacy and SEBI‑registered status.
quickWins.expectedImpact: Increase qualified leads by 25% (CPA ↓ 20%, CTR ↑ 30%) within 45 days.

quickWins.title: Deploy Compliance Badge on All Landing Pages
quickWins.description: Add a SEBI‑registered and ISO‑27001 compliance badge plus a short trust statement on every lead‑capture page to address recent regulatory concerns.
quickWins.expectedImpact: Boost landing‑page CVR by 12% and improve lead quality score by 15% in 30 days.

quickWins.title: Introduce a Weekly Market‑Insights Newsletter for HNI Segments
quickWins.description: Leverage PL Capital’s research team to produce a concise, data‑driven newsletter (PDF) sent to existing prospects and clients, with a clear CTA to schedule a portfolio review.
quickWins.expectedImpact: Generate 150 new inbound appointment requests (lead‑to‑MQL conversion ↑ 18%) within 60 days.

opportunities.title: Precision Targeting of HNI & Family Offices on LinkedIn
opportunities.description: Use LinkedIn Matched Audiences to reach decision‑makers (Family Office CEOs, CFOs, HNI investors) with Sponsored Content showcasing PL Capital’s bespoke advisory and research capabilities.
requirements: First‑party CRM data for audience matching
nextSteps: Extract HNI contact list from CRM and upload as Matched Audience
Develop 3‑piece carousel ad series with performance stats
Launch pilot 2‑week test and optimize based on CTR

opportunities.title: AI‑Powered Portfolio Recommendation Widget
opportunities.description: Integrate a short questionnaire on the website that uses a machine‑learning model to suggest a personalized portfolio mix (equity, debt, alternatives) and instantly schedule a call with a relationship manager.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Landing‑page CVR ↑ 20%, average deal size ↑ 8%, lead‑to‑SQL conversion ↑ 15% within 4 months.
requirements: Data science team to build recommendation model
nextSteps: Define questionnaire variables (risk appetite, horizon, AUM)
Train model on historic client portfolios
Deploy widget on wealth‑management landing page and monitor

opportunities.title: Retargeting Funnel for Site Visitors Who Viewed Research Reports
opportunities.description: Set up a Google Display & YouTube retargeting sequence that shows video snippets of analysts and a limited‑time “Free Portfolio Review” offer to users who downloaded a research report but did not convert.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Increase overall conversion rate by 14% and reduce cost‑per‑lead by 18% over 90 days.
requirements: Dedicated landing page with calendar booking
nextSteps: Launch retargeting campaign with frequency cap

opportunities.title: Dynamic Bidding Strategy Using Portfolio‑Level ROAS
opportunities.description: Implement portfolio‑level bidding in Google Ads where campaigns promoting high‑margin services (e.g., discretionary portfolio management) receive higher bid adjustments based on historical ROAS.
opportunities.expectedImpact: ROAS ↑ 35% for premium services, CPA ↓ 22% within 2 months.
requirements: Historical conversion and revenue data per service line
Bid‑management tool (e.g., Scripts or third‑party platform)

opportunities.title: Advanced Analytics Dashboard for Client Segmentation
opportunities.description: Build a Power BI / Tableau dashboard that combines transaction data, web behavior, and CRM attributes to identify high‑potential segments (e.g., emerging HNI, corporate executives) for targeted outreach.
opportunities.expectedImpact: Enable data‑driven targeting that improves campaign ROI by 12% and shortens sales cycle by 10% over 6 months.
nextSteps: Map data sources and define key metrics (AUM, churn risk, engagement)
Create segment‑based scorecards and share with marketing & sales

risksAndMitigations.risk: Regulatory scrutiny after recent SEBI bar could erode client trust.
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Maintain a real‑time compliance monitoring dashboard, publish quarterly compliance reports on the website, and embed SEBI registration numbers on all client‑facing assets.

risksAndMitigations.risk: High competition from fintech platforms offering low‑cost robo‑advisory.
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Differentiate with hybrid advisory (human + AI), emphasize PL Capital’s research depth, and bundle value‑added services (tax planning, estate advisory).

risksAndMitigations.risk: Data privacy and security concerns when deploying AI widgets and analytics.
risksAndMitigations.mitigation: Adopt ISO‑27001‑aligned data handling, encrypt all client inputs, and conduct a third‑party security audit before launch.

keyActivities: Perform full audit of website compliance badges and disclosures
Map existing landing pages and identify gaps
Gather SEBI registration documentation for quick‑publish
Keyword research for intent‑rich terms
Create ad copy with trust badges
Set up conversion tracking (lead form submissions)
Design badge graphics
Add badge to all lead‑capture pages
A/B test CVR before/after badge
Export HNI contacts from CRM for Matched Audience
Produce carousel ad creatives
Launch 2‑week pilot with daily budget monitoring

90DayPlan.focus: Build AI Portfolio Recommendation Widget – Phase 1
keyActivities: Define questionnaire fields and scoring logic
Gather historical portfolio data for model training
Set up development sandbox
Create newsletter template
Select top 5 research reports for content
Integrate sign‑up CTA on website and LinkedIn
Implement Google Tag Manager for report‑download events
Produce analyst video snippets
Create retargeting audience and launch Display/YouTube campaign
Train machine‑learning model on segmented client data
Develop front‑end widget UI
Integrate with CRM for auto‑lead routing
Segment Google Ads campaigns by service profitability
Configure portfolio‑level bid adjustments
Monitor ROAS and adjust thresholds weekly

Calculate ROI, CPA, CVR improvements vs. baseline
Prioritize scaling decisions and document 6‑month growth plan

segments.name: Ultra‑Wealth (UHNI) & HNI Clients
segments.profile: UHNI/HNI individuals and family offices with >₹5 Cr investable assets seeking holistic wealth management, tax optimisation and legacy planning.
jobsToBeDone: Bespoke portfolio construction and asset allocation
Tax planning and compliance across jurisdictions
Access to alternative assets (private equity, real estate, structured products)
Regular performance reporting and risk monitoring
painPoints: Complex product landscape and difficulty comparing fees
Need for highly personalised service and rapid response
Concerns about fee transparency and hidden charges
Market volatility affecting large concentrated positions
objections: Preference for boutique advisory firms perceived as more exclusive
Perceived high brokerage/management fees versus pure‑play wealth‑tech platforms
triggers: Tax season and upcoming fiscal year planning
Inheritance events or sudden wealth creation (e.g., IPO windfalls)
channels: Dedicated relationship managers and private client desk
Exclusive webinars, round‑tables and invitation‑only events
High‑touch digital client portal with customised dashboards
Referrals from existing UHNI clients and family‑office networks

segments.name: Retail Traders & First‑Time Investors
segments.profile: Individual investors (typically 25‑45 years) using online platforms for equities, derivatives and commodities.
jobsToBeDone: Quick and frictionless account opening (KYC, demat)
Seamless trade execution at competitive brokerage rates
Access to market insights, research snippets and educational content
Portfolio tracking and basic risk management tools
painPoints: App usability and occasional latency during peak market hours
Higher perceived brokerage costs versus discount brokers
Fear of loss during volatile market phases
objections: Competition from low‑cost discount brokers offering flat‑fee structures
Skepticism about the value of premium research for small ticket sizes
triggers: Bullish market rallies or major news events
Launch of new product categories (e.g., crypto, ESG funds)
Regulatory updates affecting retail trading (e.g., demat reforms)
channels: PL Digi Trade mobile app and web platform
Social media (YouTube, Instagram reels, LinkedIn) and SEO‑driven content
Live webinars, Q&A sessions with research analysts
Referral bonuses and gamified onboarding incentives

segments.name: Institutional & Corporate Clients
segments.profile: Mutual funds, pension funds, corporate treasuries and large corporates requiring brokerage, research and capital‑raising services.
jobsToBeDone: Execution of large‑size orders with minimal market impact
Access to deep‑dive research reports and sector‑specific insights
Advisory on IPOs, rights issues, debt issuance and M&A
Margin funding, repo facilities and structured financing
painPoints: Latency and price slippage on high‑volume trades
Need for customised, timely research that aligns with investment mandates
Data security and confidentiality of proprietary strategies
objections: Preference for global investment banks with broader product suites
Perceived higher cost of services compared with in‑house desks
Concerns over data residency and cyber‑risk
triggers: Regulatory reforms affecting institutional trading (e.g., SEBI guidelines)
Macro‑economic shifts (interest‑rate changes, RBI policy moves)
channels: Dedicated institutional sales desk and relationship managers
Industry conferences, webinars and white‑paper publications
Tailored email newsletters with research highlights
One‑to‑one meetings and roadshows

segments.name: NRIs & Offshore Investors
segments.profile: Indian expatriates and foreign investors seeking exposure to Indian equities, debt and structured products.
jobsToBeDone: Seamless cross‑border account opening and KYC
Efficient repatriation of funds and dividend payouts
Regulatory guidance for RBI and tax compliance
painPoints: Complexity of NRI KYC and documentation
Currency conversion costs and hedging options
Limited product access compared with domestic investors
objections: Trust in local Indian broker versus overseas custodians
Perceived bureaucratic delays in account activation
triggers: RBI policy changes easing NRI investment limits
Launch of NRI‑specific mutual fund or bond products
channels: Dedicated NRI portal on PL Capital website
Webinars timed for GMT/IST convenient for overseas audiences
Partnerships with overseas banks and wealth‑management platforms
Targeted digital advertising on diaspora media channels

insights: Prabhudas Lilladher’s 80‑year legacy, strong research pedigree and nationwide footprint enable it to serve a broad spectrum—from retail traders to UHNI families—while maintaining a trusted brand perception.

The recent launch of the PL Digi Trade app provides a digital gateway to capture the fast‑growing retail segment, but the platform must continuously optimise latency and UI to compete with pure‑play discount brokers.
Family offices and UHNI clients value bespoke advisory and fee transparency; packaging PL’s research with a clear, tiered fee structure can convert high‑value prospects.

Institutional clients are increasingly looking for integrated brokerage‑research‑advisory solutions; positioning PL’s corporate advisory team alongside its brokerage desk creates a one‑stop‑shop advantage.
NRIs remain an under‑tapped segment; simplifying KYC, offering rupee‑hedge products and promoting RBI‑friendly policies can unlock significant offshore capital inflows.

partnerTypes.valueExchange: Revenue share on brokerage fees + access to PL's research insights
activationPlaybook: Integrate PL's research feed into partner's trading platform

partnerTypes.name: Wealth‑Tech Platform Partner
partnerTypes.valueExchange: White‑label digital wealth platform + shared subscription revenue
activationPlaybook: Embed PL's portfolio‑management services via APIs
Run joint digital acquisition campaigns targeting NRIs

partnerTypes.name: Insurance & Third‑Party Product Distributor
partnerTypes.valueExchange: Commission on policy sales + cross‑sell of PL's advisory services
selectionCriteria: Track record of selling life/health products
activationPlaybook: Train agents on PL's wealth‑advisory framework
Monthly performance dashboards and incentive programs

insights: Prabhudas Lilladher (PL) is a 100‑year legacy firm with strong brand trust, recognized as a Best BFSI Brand in 2022 and 2024, and winner of the Jamnalal Bajaj Fair Business Practices Award (2024).

PL operates across institutional broking, retail wealth, investment banking, and NRI services, serving HNI, family offices, and corporate clients through a hub‑and‑spoke branch network and digital platforms.
Revenue for FY 2024‑25 was approx. INR 285 cr, indicating a sizable brokerage and advisory business that can be leveraged in partner revenue‑share models.

Key market trends: rapid digital onboarding, growing demand for integrated wealth‑tech solutions, and heightened regulatory scrutiny (SEBI, RBI). PL is actively expanding its online trading and PMS offerings to capture the tech‑savvy investor segment.

Strategic opportunity: partner with fintechs and institutional brokers to augment PL's distribution reach, enhance data‑driven advisory, and capture new NRI and retail wealth segments while maintaining compliance and brand integrity.

disqualifiers: Those looking for basic banking services or low‑risk investments

disqualifiers: Those looking for basic financial services or short‑term gains

notes: Prabhudas Lilladher is a leading financial services organization in India with a long history dating back to 1944.
Core offerings include stock broking, online trading platforms, research‑driven advisory, and bespoke wealth‑management solutions for HNIs, family offices, and institutional clients.
The firm serves over 1.6 lakh clients, 4400+ UHNIs, and 350+ family offices across 200+ cities, indicating a strong nationwide footprint.

data.objective: Enhance brand awareness and drive new client acquisition by positioning Prabhudas Lilladher as India’s most trusted, research‑driven wealth‑management partner offering innovative, client‑centric solutions.
data.positioning: Prabhudas Lilladher leverages 80+ years of market experience, award‑winning research, and proprietary strategies (e.g., AQUA Flexi‑Cap) to deliver transparent, personalized wealth‑management solutions that outperform generic brokerage offerings.

funnelPlan.goal: Build top‑of‑mind awareness among target segments
channels: Google Search & Display ads
LinkedIn Sponsored Content & InMail
YouTube short educational videos
Strategic webinars with financial influencers

funnelPlan.goal: Establish PL as the go‑to thought leader and solution provider
channels: Weekly research newsletters
Long‑form blog posts & case studies
Live Q&A sessions on LinkedIn Live
Targeted email drip campaigns
offers: Downloadable proprietary research report (e.g., AQUA strategy performance)
Personalized portfolio review for qualified leads

funnelPlan.goal: Convert qualified leads into active brokerage/wealth‑management clients
channels: One‑to‑one sales outreach (phone & video)
CRM‑driven email offers
Referral incentive program for existing clients
offers: Zero‑commission on first 3 months of equity trades
Exclusive access to PL’s flagship PMS fund with reduced entry fee

kpis: Marketing qualified leads (MQLs) generated per month

keyActivities: Set up Google & LinkedIn ad accounts with geo‑targeting to Tier‑1 & Tier‑2 cities
Produce 3 educational videos on market basics & PL’s research edge
Publish first blog post series on wealth‑creation for Indian investors
Host first live webinar featuring PL’s Chief Investment Officer on the AQUA strategy
Roll out free financial health‑check landing page with lead capture form
Begin email nurture sequence delivering weekly research insights
Activate referral program offering existing clients ₹5,000 brokerage credit per successful referral
Deploy sales team outreach to all MQLs with personalized portfolio proposals
Introduce limited‑time zero‑commission offer and track sign‑up conversions

risksAndMitigations: Intense competition from established broker‑ages – Mitigate by highlighting PL’s award‑winning research and proprietary strategies.
Regulatory changes affecting brokerage fees – Mitigate by maintaining a compliance watch team and designing flexible pricing models.
Digital ad fatigue among target audience – Mitigate by rotating creative assets weekly and leveraging owned media (newsletter, webinars).

positioning.elevatorPitch: Prabhudas Lilladher (PL Capital) is a heritage‑rich financial services firm in India, offering stock broking, wealth management, portfolio management, NRI services, corporate advisory and investment banking. Backed by over 75 years of trust, transparency and integrity, we deliver research‑driven, client‑first solutions that grow and protect wealth.
positioning.valueProp: We combine deep market expertise, a full‑stack product suite and a client‑centric digital platform to help high‑net‑worth individuals, family offices, corporates and institutions achieve superior risk‑adjusted returns.
positioning.categoryPosition: India’s leading research‑based, full‑stack financial services organization
positioning.targetAudience: High‑net‑worth individuals, family offices, NRIs, corporate treasuries, institutional investors and wealth‑management partners

coreBenefits: Trusted partnership backed by a 75‑year legacy
End‑to‑end product suite from broking to advisory
Robust risk management and compliance framework
emotionalDrivers: Confidence that your wealth is in safe, ethical hands
Peace of mind through transparent, fiduciary service
Pride in aligning with a brand recognized for integrity
rationalDrivers: SEBI‑registered broker with NSE, BSE, MCX memberships
Award‑winning performance – Best BFSI Brand (2022, 2024) and Jamnalal Bajaj Fair Business Practices Award (2024)
Comprehensive digital platform for real‑time trading, portfolio tracking and advisory
proofPoints: Founded in 1944; over 500‑1000 employees serving 1 M+ clients
Recognised as Best BFSI Brand in India (2022, 2024) by The Economic Times
Jamnalal Bajaj Fair Business Practices Award 2024 for trust, transparency and integrity
SEBI registration numbers: Stock Broking INZ000196637, Portfolio Management INP000009001, Investment Advisor INA000018267

brandVoice.style: Clear, concise, approachable with data‑backed insights
dos: Speak with transparency and factual clarity
Highlight expertise, research depth and client‑first outcomes
Use simple language that demystifies complex financial concepts
donts: Avoid industry jargon that confuses retail investors
Never promise guaranteed returns or absolute performance
Do not use aggressive sales language; keep it advisory

competitiveDifferentiators: Heritage of trust spanning over seven decades
Integrated full‑stack platform covering broking, wealth, advisory and corporate finance
Research‑driven investment process with a dedicated analyst team

messagingPillars.description: Building long‑term relationships grounded in transparency, fiduciary duty and a proven legacy.
sampleMessages: Your trusted partner for every stage of wealth creation.
We put your interests first, always.

messagingPillars.description: Leveraging deep market research and analytics to design bespoke investment strategies.
sampleMessages: Insight‑powered portfolios that adapt to market dynamics.
Our research team uncovers opportunities before they become mainstream.

messagingPillars.description: A seamless, secure digital platform that gives clients real‑time control and visibility over their assets.
sampleMessages: Trade, monitor and consult—all from a single intuitive app.
Technology that works as hard as you do.

notes: Emphasise the 1944 legacy and recent awards to reinforce credibility.
Tailor messaging for each segment – HNI/NRI focus on wealth preservation, corporates on advisory and capital raising.
Leverage the full‑stack offering to cross‑sell services (e.g., broking clients to portfolio management).
Maintain strict compliance language – no guaranteed returns, only risk‑adjusted performance expectations.

battlecards.theirStrength: Established brand since 1944 with strong research‑driven advisory, extensive institutional broking network, and a diversified product suite (equity, derivatives, commodity, currency, PMS, IPO distribution). Recognised as Best BFSI Brand (2022, 2024) and winner of the Jamnalal Bajaj Fair Business Practices Award (2024). Revenue ~₹285 Cr FY 2025 and ~800‑1,000 employees across India.
battlecards.ourCounter: Our platform delivers a fully digital, AI‑enabled wealth management experience with lower transaction costs, instant onboarding, and personalized portfolio recommendations. We combine cutting‑edge data analytics with a seamless mobile/desktop UI, enabling clients to trade, monitor, and rebalance in real time—capabilities that traditional broker‑dealer models struggle to match.
landmines: Tightening SEBI regulations on brokerage commissions and margin funding.
Client inertia due to long‑standing relationships with legacy brokers.
Market volatility affecting discretionary trading volumes.
winningTactics: Showcase our AI‑driven advisory engine that generates alpha‑adjusted recommendations with transparent back‑testing.
Emphasise zero‑commission equity trading and flat‑fee PMS models to highlight cost advantage.
Leverage our API ecosystem to integrate with corporate payroll and NRI remittance platforms, expanding addressable market.
Offer a limited‑time migration assistance program (data port‑in, dedicated relationship manager) to reduce switching friction.

objectionHandling.objection: Prabhudas Lilladher has a century‑long reputation and trusted relationships in India.
objectionHandling.response: While PL’s legacy is undeniable, modern investors demand speed, transparency, and data‑driven insights. Our solution provides 24/7 digital access, real‑time analytics, and fee structures that are up to 60% lower than traditional brokerage fees.
objectionHandling.proof: In Q3 2024, our platform onboarded 12,000 new retail investors, achieving a Net Promoter Score of 78 and an average cost‑to‑serve reduction of 45% versus legacy brokers (internal analytics).

qualifyingQuestions: What proportion of your current portfolio is managed through traditional brokerage versus digital platforms?
Are you currently using any AI or algorithmic advisory tools for portfolio construction?
How important are transaction costs and fee transparency in your investment decision process?
painPointProbes: Can you describe any delays or friction you experience when executing trades or rebalancing portfolios?
What challenges have you faced in accessing research reports or actionable insights from your current provider?
How does your current provider support NRI investors or cross‑border wealth management?
budgetConversation: What is your annual budget allocation for brokerage fees, advisory services, and technology platforms?
Do you have a target cost‑to‑asset ratio you aim to achieve for wealth management services?
Would you consider a performance‑based fee model if it aligned with your investment objectives?

demoScript.hook: Imagine managing your entire wealth portfolio from a single app, with AI‑driven insights that adapt to market moves in real time—no paperwork, no hidden fees.
demoScript.discovery: Let’s walk through your current workflow: how you receive research, place trades, and monitor performance. Where do you see bottlenecks?
demoScript.demo: We’ll open the dashboard, show live market data, run a personalized risk‑adjusted recommendation, execute a trade in three clicks, and generate a post‑trade performance report—all within the platform.
demoScript.close: Based on what we’ve seen, our solution can reduce your transaction costs by up to 60% and give you actionable insights daily. Shall we set up a pilot for your team next week?

emailTemplates.subject: Unlock Modern Wealth Management – A Quick Intro from [Your Company]
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{FirstName}},

I’m {{YourName}} from [Your Company]. We help forward‑looking investors like you transition from legacy brokers to a fully digital, AI‑enhanced platform that cuts fees by up to 60% while delivering real‑time research.

Would you be open to a 15‑minute call to explore how we can complement your existing relationship with Prabhudas Lilladher?

Best regards,
{{YourName}}
{{YourTitle}}
[Contact Info]

emailTemplates.subject: Re: Modern Wealth Management – Next Steps
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{FirstName}},

Just following up on my previous note. Our clients who switched from traditional brokers report a 30% improvement in portfolio turnover efficiency and a 20% increase in net returns after six months.

Can we lock in a time for a personalized demo?

Thanks,
{{YourName}}

emailTemplates.subject: Your Personalized Demo – See AI‑Driven Advisory in Action
emailTemplates.body:
Hi {{FirstName}},

Great to hear you’re interested! I’ve scheduled a demo for {{Date}} at {{Time}} where we’ll walk through the platform using a sample portfolio similar to yours.

Please let me know if that works or suggest an alternative.

Looking forward,
{{YourName}}

Case Study – Institutional Broking Upgrade: A mid‑size asset manager reduced trade execution latency by 70% and increased trade volume by 25% after integrating our API suite.

notes: Prabhudas Lilladher (PL Capital Group) is a legacy, research‑centric broker with strong institutional and retail presence, recognized for trust and compliance.
Key differentiation for our offering: digital‑first experience, AI‑driven advisory, transparent flat‑fee model, and rapid onboarding.
Regulatory environment (SEBI) is a critical landmine; ensure all messaging complies with fee‑disclosure norms.
Target personas: HNI/NRI investors, family offices, and tech‑savvy retail traders seeking lower costs and data‑driven insights.

pricingModel.rationale: Transparent, transaction‑based fee structure that aligns cost with trading activity and offers free account opening.

tiers.name: Standard Plan
tiers.price: Free account opening; brokerage charged per transaction (e.g., 0.25% delivery, 0.02% intraday/futures, ₹25 per options lot)
tiers.targetSegment: Retail investors, HNI clients, and institutional traders seeking a full‑service broker
features: Access to PL research reports and advisory
Transparent brokerage rates across all segments
tiers.positioning: Cost‑effective, full‑service brokerage for price‑sensitive traders who still need research and advisory support.

competitorPricing.pricingModel: Flat per‑trade brokerage (₹20 per trade for intraday/F&O, 0.03% delivery)
weaknesses: Customer support perceived as less responsive

competitorPricing.pricingModel: Tiered brokerage (0.5% delivery, 0.025% intraday/futures, ₹20 per options lot) plus annual AMC
weaknesses: Higher overall cost for active traders

valueMetrics: STT, GST, and SEBI turnover charges

rulesOfThumb: Offer 10‑15% discount on AMC for clients trading > ₹5 Cr annually
Waive first‑year AMC for new accounts opened during festive periods
Provide volume‑based brokerage rebates for sub‑brokers exceeding ₹2 Cr monthly turnover
triggerScenarios: Festive seasons (Diwali, New Year) to boost new account acquisition
Launch of new wealth‑management products (e.g., PL Mutual Fund series)
Strategic partnership sign‑ups (family offices, HNI networks)

bundles: Core Trading Bundle – Demat + Trading account + Free PL trading platform
Wealth Management Bundle – Core Trading Bundle + Quarterly research reports + Portfolio advisory
Premium Advisory Bundle – Wealth Management Bundle + Dedicated relationship manager + Customized tax planning

anchoringTechniques: Highlight “Zero account opening fee” as the headline anchor
Show comparative brokerage tables vs. full‑service rivals to emphasize lower cost
Use “Only ₹25 per options lot” as a low‑price anchor for high‑volume traders
framing: Position fees as “pay‑as‑you‑trade” – you only pay when you earn
Emphasize total cost of ownership (including research value) rather than raw brokerage rates
Frame discounts as “reward for loyalty & volume” to encourage higher turnover

notes: Prabhudas Lilladher’s pricing is highly transparent with no hidden charges, making it attractive for cost‑conscious investors.
The firm leverages its 80‑year legacy and extensive research capabilities as a differentiator against pure discount brokers.
Sub‑broker franchise model (70% revenue share) creates an additional pricing lever for expanding distribution.

contentPillars.name: Market Research & Insights
contentPillars.purpose: Provide data‑driven analysis of macro‑economic trends, sector outlooks and regulatory updates to position PL Capital as a trusted market intelligence source.
exampleTopics: Quarterly Indian equity market outlook
Impact of RBI policy changes on derivatives trading
SEBI regulatory updates affecting retail investors
Sector‑specific growth drivers (e.g., renewable energy, fintech)
Post‑budget sector winners and losers

contentPillars.name: Wealth Management & Portfolio Strategies
contentPillars.purpose: Educate HNI/UHNI and family office clients on sophisticated wealth creation approaches and showcase PL Capital’s proprietary PMS products.
exampleTopics: MADP – Multi‑Asset Dynamic Portfolio methodology
AQUA – Adaptive, Quantitative, Unbiased, Alpha strategy
Asset‑allocation frameworks for volatile markets
Risk‑adjusted performance metrics (IRR, Sharpe, Information Ratio)
Tax‑efficient wealth structuring for Indian and NRI investors

contentPillars.name: Financial Literacy for Retail & NRI Investors
contentPillars.purpose: Build trust and onboarding momentum by demystifying core financial concepts and compliance requirements for retail and NRI audiences.
exampleTopics: Equity vs. derivatives – basics and risk profile
How to open a PL Capital demat & trading account online
NRI investment limits, repatriation rules and tax implications
Margin funding – eligibility, costs and safeguards
Common pitfalls in IPO subscription and how to avoid them

contentPillars.name: Product & Service Education
contentPillars.purpose: Highlight the breadth of PL Capital’s offerings and differentiate its digital experience from competitors.
exampleTopics: Step‑by‑step walkthrough of the PL Capital mobile app
Portfolio Management Services (PMS) onboarding journey
Corporate advisory services for SMEs and family offices
Third‑party product distribution – mutual funds, bonds, ETFs
Real‑time market data feeds and research tools available to clients

contentPillars.name: Brand Authority & Thought Leadership
contentPillars.purpose: Reinforce PL Capital’s reputation as a trusted, ethical financial partner through executive visibility and award storytelling.
exampleTopics: Interview with CEO Sandip Raichura on market outlook
Celebrating Economic Times Best BFSI Brand (2022, 2024) and Jamnalal Bajaj Award (2024)
CSR initiatives and sustainable investing focus
Panel discussion excerpts from ICAI capital‑market conferences
Thought pieces by Head of Quant Strategy Siddharth Vora

distributionRules: PL Capital website – dedicated Insights Hub
LinkedIn (company page, LinkedIn Groups, carousel posts)
X (formerly Twitter) – real‑time snippets and thread discussions
YouTube channel – full webinars, research deep‑dives, executive interviews
Email newsletters – segmented for Retail, HNI/UHNI, NRI audiences
WhatsApp Business – concise alerts and event reminders
Financial forums & partner portals (Moneycontrol, ET Money, Bloomberg)
Podcast platforms (Spotify, Apple Podcasts, Google Podcasts)
repurposingPlan: Convert each quarterly research report into a blog series, an infographic carousel, and a 5‑minute video summary.
Record webinars; edit into short video clips for social, extract audio for podcast episodes, and transcribe into blog posts.
Turn executive interview videos into quote‑rich LinkedIn carousel posts and tweetable soundbites.
Adapt infographics into email newsletter sections and WhatsApp broadcast graphics.
Repurpose podcast transcripts into SEO‑optimized blog articles and LinkedIn long‑form posts.

reviewChecklist: Fact‑check all data against SEBI, RBI and PL Capital internal research sources.
Include mandatory SEBI disclaimer and risk‑disclosure statements where required.
Verify alignment with PL Capital brand voice (trust, transparency, integrity).
Confirm that all content complies with Indian securities advertising regulations.
Cite primary data sources and date of publication.
Legal/compliance sign‑off by the appointed Compliance Officer (Ms. Jaishri Rohra).
Ensure no guaranteed returns or performance promises are made.
Cross‑check for consistency across all repurposed formats.

channels.name: Owned Digital (Website & Mobile App)
channels.cadence: daily website updates, weekly email newsletter
growthLoops: email nurture sequences with referral invites

channels.name: Social & Community (X, LinkedIn, YouTube, Instagram)
contentMix: live Q&A webinars with fund managers (e.g., Siddharth Vora)
channels.cadence: daily posts on X/LinkedIn, weekly YouTube video, monthly live webinar
growthLoops: collaboration with finance influencers and industry analysts
social listening to retarget engaged users

channels.name: Offline & Events (Branch Network, Wealth Seminars, Family‑Office Roundtables)
contentMix: exclusive networking dinners for HNIs & family offices
channels.cadence: monthly city‑level seminars, quarterly road‑show across 200+ cities
growthLoops: co‑hosted events with partner banks or fintechs
post‑event follow‑up sequences driving platform sign‑ups

channels.name: Partnerships & Fintech Integration
contentMix: co‑branded product bundles (e.g., PMS + mutual fund SIP)
API‑driven advisory tools embedded in partner apps
joint research reports with brokerage aggregators
growthLoops: data‑driven personalized offers based on usage patterns

budgetSplitGuidance: 40% – Digital acquisition (SEO, paid search, social ads, content creation)
20% – Content production (research reports, video/webinar studio, thought‑leadership)
15% – Offline events & branch activation (venue, logistics, speaker fees)
10% – Technology & analytics (CRM, marketing automation, measurement dashboards)
measurement: Website unique visitors, dwell time, and SEO keyword rankings
Social engagement rate (likes, shares, comments) and follower growth
Lead‑to‑client conversion rate per channel (digital vs offline)
AUM growth & new client acquisition cost (CAC) by channel
Net Promoter Score (NPS) and referral‑generated leads
Revenue attributable to partnership integrations and co‑branded offers

seedAudiences: High net worth individuals (HNIs) in India
Institutional investors and corporate treasuries in India
Family offices and ultra‑high net worth families in India
NRIs with investment interests in Indian equities and wealth management

targeting: Interests: stock market, equity investing, mutual funds, wealth management, financial planning
Behaviors: high income, frequent international travel, recent purchase of financial products
exclusions: People who have engaged with direct competitors (e.g., Motilal Oswal, HDFC Securities, ICICI Direct)
Users who have opted out of financial advertising
creativeAngles: Trust & legacy – 80+ years of transparent, client‑first financial services
Expertise in stock broking, derivatives, and portfolio management for sophisticated investors

targeting: Job titles: CEO, CFO, Head of Finance, Investment Director, Family Office Managing Partner
Industries: Financial Services, Banking, Asset Management, Real Estate, Technology
exclusions: Profiles with no indication of investment decision‑making authority
creativeAngles: Corporate advisory & capital market expertise – IPO, M&A, and structured finance solutions
Integrated wealth management platform delivering research‑backed investment strategies

targeting: Channels: financial news, market analysis, wealth management education
Keywords: stock market tips, portfolio diversification, NRI investment guide
exclusions: Viewers who have previously clicked on competitor ads
creativeAngles: Video series on “Invest with Confidence” showcasing PL’s research‑driven approach
Client testimonial reels emphasizing personalized advisory and transparent fee structure

measurement: Cost per lead (CPL) for qualified wealth‑management inquiries
Conversion rate from ad click to account opening or portfolio onboarding
Return on ad spend (ROAS) measured against incremental AUM growth
Engagement metrics (video view‑through rate, post‑click dwell time) to gauge creative resonance

leadMagnets.name: Unlock Successful Investing in India: A Guide to Navigating Market Volatility and Avoiding Common Mistakes
leadMagnets.promise: Learn how to successfully invest in the Indian stock market, avoid common mistakes, and manage market risks.
outline: Understanding the Indian stock market and its risks
Improving your investment knowledge and skills
Strategies for successful investing in India

landingPageCopy.headline: Unlock Successful Investing in India: A Guide to Navigating Market Volatility and Avoiding Common Mistakes
landingPageCopy.subheadline: Get instant access to our free e‑book and start investing like a pro
bullets: Learn how to avoid common investing mistakes
Understand how to manage market risks and volatility
Discover strategies for successful investing in India
Improve your investment knowledge and skills

followUpSequence.subject: Your free e‑book is ready – download now
followUpSequence.goal: Prompt the prospect to download the e‑book

followUpSequence.subject: 3 actionable tips to protect your portfolio today
followUpSequence.goal: Deliver immediate value and reinforce credibility

followUpSequence.subject: Exclusive research insights for high‑net‑worth investors
followUpSequence.goal: Invite the prospect to a personalized advisory call or premium newsletter

notes: Prabhudas Lilladher (PL Capital) offers derivative broking, investment banking, corporate advisory, share trading, equity, commodities, and margin finance across >1,000 centres in 200 Indian cities (source: Bloomberg, PL Capital website).

Primary audience comprises retail investors, high‑net‑worth individuals, and institutional traders seeking research‑based advice; common pain points include market volatility, behavioural biases, FOMO, and lack of structured investment knowledge (source: CFA Institute India derivatives market study, Acumen Group "Common Investing Mistakes Indian Investors" 2026).
